verses.1: A Psalm of Praise, of David. I will exalt You, my God, the King, And I will bless Your name forever and ever.
verses.2: Every day I will bless You, And I will praise Your name forever and ever.
verses.3: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised; And His greatness is unsearchable.
verses.4: One generation will praise Your works to another, And will declare Your mighty acts.
verses.5: On the glorious splendor of Your majesty And on Your wonderful works, I will meditate.
verses.6: People will speak of the power of Your awesome acts, And I will tell of Your greatness.
verses.7: They will burst forth in speaking of Your abundant goodness, And will shout joyfully of Your righteousness.
verses.8: The LORD is gracious and compassionate; Slow to anger and great in mercy.
verses.9: The LORD is good to all, And His mercies are over all His works.
verses.10: All Your works will give thanks to You, LORD, And Your godly ones will bless You.
verses.11: They will speak of the glory of Your kingdom, And talk of Your might,
verses.12: To make known to the sons of mankind Your mighty acts, And the glory of the majesty of Your kingdom.
verses.13: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, And Your dominion endures throughout all generations. The LORD is faithful in His words, And holy in all His works.
verses.14: The LORD supports all who fall, And raises up all who are bowed down.
verses.15: The eyes of all look to You, And You give them their food in due time.
verses.16: You open Your hand And satisfy the desire of every living thing.
verses.17: The LORD is righteous in all His ways, And kind in all His works.
verses.18: The LORD is near to all who call on Him, To all who call on Him in truth.
verses.19: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear Him; He will also hear their cry for help and save them.
verses.20: The LORD watches over all who love Him, But He will destroy all the wicked.
verses.21: My mouth will speak the praise of the LORD, And all flesh will bless His holy name forever and ever.
